zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Paine於1692年11月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其時，她的父親Nicholas Paine27歲，母親Mary Hackney26歲。她於1708年8月18日與John Rhodes在美國維吉尼亞州米德萊可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1742年9月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Paine于1692年11月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其时，她的父亲Nicholas Paine27岁，母亲Mary Hackney26岁。她于1708年8月18日与John Rhodes在美国弗吉尼亚州米德萊可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1742年9月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Paine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: The author of the republican treatise The Rights of Man, Thomas Paine (1737–1809), left England for North America in the mid 1770s, where he became involved in the movement that led to independence. His pamphlet of 1776, Common Sense, influenced the Declaration of Independence and furnished some of the arguments justifying it.

variants.name: Pain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean-Luc, Normand, Reynald, Veronique.
French: from pain ‘bread’, used as a nickname for a baker.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Paine was born on 27 November 1692, in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, Nicholas Paine, was 27 and her mother, Mary Hackney, was 26. She married John Rhodes on 18 August 1708, in Middlesex, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 10 daughters. She died on 20 September 1742, in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Paine est née le 27 novembre 1692, à Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Nicholas Paine, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Hackney, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Rhodes le 18 août 1708, à Middlesex, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1742, à Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Paine am 27. November 1692 in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Paine 27 und ihre Mutter Mary Hackney 26. Sie hat am 18. August 1708 in Middlesex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten John Rhodes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. September 1742 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Paine è nata il il 27 novembre 1692 nel Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, sua padre, Nicholas Paine, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mary Hackney, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Rhodes il 18 agosto 1708, nel Middlesex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1742, nel Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Paineが1692年11月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチで生まれた時，父Nicholas Paineは27歳，母Mary Hackneyは26歳であった。1708年8月18日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ミッドレセックスでJohn Rhodesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1742年9月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリスト チャーチで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Paine(이)가 1692년 11월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Paine(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Hackney(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1708년 8월 18일 미국 버지니아 주 미들레세스에서 John Rhodes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1742년 9월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 c후르치에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Paine nasceu em 27 de novembro de 1692, em Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Nicholas Paine, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Hackney, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Rhodes em 18 de agosto de 1708, em Middlesex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1742, em Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Paine родилась 27 ноября 1692 г. в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Nicholas Paine было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Hackney, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Rhodes 18 августа 1708 г. в местности миддлесекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла 20 сентября 1742 г. в местности краист чурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Paine nació el 27 de noviembre de 1692, en Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Nicholas Paine, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary Hackney, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Rhodes el 18 de agosto de 1708, en Middlesex, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1742, en Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 49 años.
